item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-028","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答按落地页目标和KPI直接判断市场部/产品部责任归属，给出清晰分工和默认结论“通常市场主导，产品强审核”。没有套用agentic/control-boundary框架，也没有使用WAE式术语分析部门职责，符合negative_control的stay-asleep预期。"}
